name: Administrative Community Development Director Meeting
summary:
• Design Review for an approximate 312 square foot elevated deck and a Coastal Development Permit for an attached 291 square foot accessory dwelling unit (ADU) in the Local Business Professional (LBP) zone.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files

seo_text: AGENDA Administrative Community Development Director Meeting WEDNESDAY, JUNE 17, 2026 REGULAR MEETING - 3:00 p.m. Council Chambers 505 Forest Avenue Laguna Beach, CA 92651 ADMINISTRATIVE COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT DIRECTOR MEETING - 3:00 PM You may submit comments on any agenda item in writing to the Planning Manager at: 505 Forest Avenue, Laguna Beach, CA 92651 or by email to the assigned project planner. name: Planning Commission
summary:

seo_text: 1. CALL TO ORDER 2. ROLL CALL 3. PUBLIC COMMUNICATIONS - At this time, members of the Public may address the Planning Commission regarding any items not on the agenda but within the subject matter jurisdiction of the Planning Commission. No action may be taken on off-agenda items unless authorized by law. Comments shall be limited to three (3) minutes each, unless extended for good cause by the Planning Commission. 4.
